ExportField.title: Export Field Setting
ExportField.description: Stores whether a specific field for a specific template is selected for export.

templateId.description: The MODX template ID (e.g., 7 for Doctors, 6 for Services)

fieldName.description: The name of the field or TV

isExportable.description: Whether this field should be included in the dump

/export_fields/{fieldId}.description: Settings for which fields to export.
